title: Dimocarpus malesianus
taxonomy: Dimocarpus malesianus is classified as a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae. It belongs to the genus Dimocarpus, which is a group of trees and shrubs native to Southeast Asia. The Sapindaceae family is a large group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the soapberry or lychee family. The classification of Dimocarpus malesianus is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the Sapindaceae family. As a member of the Sapindaceae family, Dimocarpus malesianus is closely related to other species such as the rambutan and the lychee.
